scripts.start: npm run build.dev && concurrently "npm run tsc-watch" "nodemon --watch build build/index.js"
scripts.start.prod: npm run build.prod && npm run serve.prod
scripts.test: npm run build.dev && rimraf igo-test.db && gulp tslint && NODE_ENV=test tape ./build/**/*.test.js | tap-spec
scripts.test.poi: npm run build.dev && rimraf igo-test.db && gulp tslint && NODE_ENV=test tape ./build/poi/*.test.js | tap-spec
scripts.test.tool: npm run build.dev && rimraf igo-test.db && gulp tslint && NODE_ENV=test tape ./build/tool*/*.test.js | tap-spec
scripts.test.layer: npm run build.dev && rimraf igo-test.db && gulp tslint && NODE_ENV=test tape ./build/layer*/*.test.js | tap-spec
scripts.test.context: npm run build.dev && rimraf igo-test.db && gulp tslint && NODE_ENV=test tape ./build/context*/*.test.js | tap-spec
scripts.initDB: npm run build.dev && rimraf igo.db && node build/initDB.js
scripts.coverage: npm run build.coverage && npm run serve.coverage
